meme.title: Actually someone stole his tail, so he had to settle for an orange one😼

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “We all know how he feels..."
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-04-21)
Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.

headlines.h: Opinion: Well… that actually worked (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
